name: 6ct: Frosted Vanilla Cupcake Wax Melts 2.5oz - Threshold™
description:
Unwind in the lively aroma of 6ct Frosted Vanilla Cupcake Wax Melts 2.5oz from Threshold™. This pack includes six square-shaped wax melts, each crafted from a blend of palm wax and paraffin wax to ensure long-lasting infusion. With a total weight of 2.5 ounces, these wax melts are great for filling your living space with sweet, inviting fragrance. Simply break off a piece, place it in your wax warmer and enjoy hours of delightful vibe.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
